hero_headline: Get Back on the Road Fast in Dallas
hero_subtext: Honest auto repair and body work for every make and model. No surprises, no upsells, just good work at fair prices.

services.name: Brake Repair
services.description: Squealing, grinding, or soft pedal? We diagnose and fix brake issues fast with quality parts. Your safety is our top priority.

services.name: Engine Diagnostics
services.description: Check engine light on? Our advanced diagnostic tools pinpoint the problem so you only pay for what needs fixing. No guesswork.

services.name: Oil Change & Tune-Up
services.description: Keep your engine running smooth with regular oil changes and tune-ups. We use manufacturer-recommended fluids and filters.

services.name: Body Work & Paint
services.description: From minor dents to full collision repair, our body shop restores your vehicle to showroom condition. Color-matched paint guaranteed.

services.name: Transmission Service
services.description: Slipping gears or rough shifting? We service and repair both automatic and manual transmissions to keep you driving smooth.

about_text: We've been fixing cars in Dallas for over 15 years. Our ASE-certified mechanics treat every vehicle like their own. No unnecessary repairs, no surprise charges.
meta_title: Quick Fix Auto Repair | Dallas TX Auto Shop & Body Work
meta_description: Trusted auto repair in Dallas, TX. Brake repair, engine diagnostics, body work. ASE-certified. Call (214) 555-0456.
